required_future_artifacts.purpose: canonical RED->RESET->GREEN evidence bound to IF09-FIND-001 and merged Track A
clean-state reset proof between RED and GREEN
benign-flow proof for accepted merged Track A lineage
kill-switch availability or explicit not-applicable proof
rollback proof tied to accepted merged Track A lineage, not failed local attempt

acceptance_criteria_for_future_materiali: Every required artifact exists on disk with stable sha256 recorded in the future packet.
Every required artifact binds to IF09-FIND-001, patch commit 1e9a04a02846f3261ae72d0c95fbee6b0163b45b, and merge commit 7883af5a32c629026bfc6dc15ebee4ebbcadd295.
RED, RESET, and GREEN are represented as an ordered chain and include no-contamination attestation.
Benign, rollback, and kill-switch evidence is either concrete proof or an explicit not-applicable proof where the contract allows it.
No future artifact claims finding closure, remediation proof, product readiness, Bedrock readiness, or safe/resolved status.
